description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs every Sunday at 7AM UTC and allows manual dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: build-gem5 and HACC-tests, both running on a self-hosted Linux environment with a specific container. The build-gem5 job checks out the develop branch, builds gem5, and uploads the build artifact. The HACC-tests job depends on build-gem5, checks out the develop branch, downloads the gem5 build artifact, and runs HACC tests with a specific configuration.
